rejected_shapes.reason: Fits wider D blocks but only reduces layer-2 atomic traffic 1.43x, leaving about 565M H64 atomic elements.
Persistent accumulator plus row-state p99 is 162.62 KiB before score microtile scratch, already above the 128 KiB planning budget.
Adding fp32 QK and grad-prob scratch pushes p99 combined scratch to 131.29 KiB, above the 128 KiB planning budget.

next_candidate.description: First executable streaming D-blocked MFMA compressed-dKV accumulator for actual dynamic LI routes.
next_candidate.expected_dkv_write_contract: Accumulate dKV by unique compressed group inside the tile and write each group/D-block once per tile, replacing per-token/per-selected global atomic adds.
next_candidate.important_caveat: This is a schedule contract, not a performance result. It still needs an executable Triton/TileLang/CK kernel and parity against the current shared-KV backward. It is selected over the route-max tile because it keeps the selected-key loop at 256 microsteps per D-block tile while still cutting H64 dKV atomic traffic by about 23.8x.

stretch_candidate.description: Route-max tile-local coalescing candidate with higher implementation pressure.
stretch_candidate.important_caveat: This has the strongest write reduction but extreme loop pressure: 64 token rows times 16 selected-key microtiles per D-block tile. Treat it as a second-stage TileLang/CK target after proving the smaller pressure-balanced kernel.

layer3_easy_case.read: Layer 3 fits comfortably because the topology is all-valid over only 32 compressed groups.

read: The next sparse-attention backward experiment should not be another dense-route BMM, group-major recompute, materialized partial buffer, or small local atomic coalescer. The narrowed layer-2 path is a pressure-balanced streaming D16 compressed-dKV accumulator. The first executable candidate is token_block=32, selected_block=512, micro_selected=64: it cuts H64 dKV writes about 23.8x while keeping the selected-key microtile loop to 256 steps per D-block tile. The older token_block=64, selected_block=512 shape remains a stretch target with 47.25x write reduction but 1024 microsteps per D-block tile, or the implementation can go deeper and fuse LI/compressor backward to avoid writing compressed dKV in this form.
